name: Universe Origins
description: From the Big Bang through the formation of galaxies, stars, and the conditions for life.

name: Earth Formation
description: Formation of the Earth, Moon, and the early geological processes that shaped our planet.

name: Origin of Life
description: From the first single-celled organisms through the Cambrian explosion and rise of complex life.

name: Human Evolution
description: The emergence of Homo sapiens, migration out of Africa, and prehistoric civilizations.

name: Ancient Civilizations
description: The rise of agriculture, writing, and the first great civilizations of Mesopotamia, Egypt, and Indus Valley.

name: Classical Era
description: The age of Greek philosophy, Roman empire, Han dynasty, and the Axial Age of ideas.

name: Medieval Period
description: Islamic Golden Age, Byzantine Empire, Crusades, Mongol expansion, and Black Death.

name: Early Modern Era
description: Age of Exploration, Renaissance, Reformation, Scientific Revolution, and rise of colonial empires.

name: Industrial Age
description: Industrial Revolution, age of steam and railways, mass migration, and the birth of modern nations.

name: Modern Era
description: Two World Wars, Cold War, decolonization, space age, and the digital revolution.

name: Present Day
description: The 21st century: globalization, climate change, AI revolution, and the shaping of our future.
